title: AstraZeneca India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: AstraZeneca India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!
